phases.name: Slice 1 — Sign-in happy path is server-driven
phases.description: Walking skeleton plus US-001/US-002 error paths and scope resolver invariants.

steps.name: Walking skeleton sign-in to welcome page
steps.scenario_name: Maya completes sign-in and the welcome page recognizes her by name
steps.scenario: walking-skeleton.feature - Maya completes sign-in and the welcome page recognizes her by name
criteria: Walking skeleton scenario goes from RED 501 to GREEN through real auth-proxy chain
Real auth-proxy, real flow-state tier, real Redis, fake WorkOS over loopback HTTP
Maya reaches authenticated_no_org state via driving port only
CM-A verified: no test imports flow-state/lib internals
Auth-proxy adds /flow-state/* multi-upstream rule per ADR-030 SD1
steps.implementation_notes: Replace SCAFFOLD stubs with XState v5 setup() machine, Redis XADD/XRANGE adapter, anonymous->authenticating->authenticated_no_org transitions. ScopeResolver returns no-org scope. Auth-proxy gains /flow-state/* path-prefix routing rule per ADR-030 SD1. Per design handoff, write pure helpers first (validateOrgName classifier shape), then wrap in XState actor side effects.

steps.name: Slice 1 error paths and reissue endpoint
steps.scenario_name: Six slice-1 error scenarios across US-001 US-002 negative branches
steps.scenario: slice-1-error-paths.feature - six scenarios across US-001 and US-002 negative branches
criteria: Six slice-1 error-path scenarios green
Failure modes covered: workos_profile_corrupt, jwks_not_warm, org_validation_failed, jwt_reissue_failed
POST /api/auth/reissue endpoint added to backend per ADR-029 invariant 4
Idempotent retry of JWT reissue with 3 attempts then error_recoverable partial-setup tag
Stale-config route still serves Maya to welcome page
steps.implementation_notes: Backend POST /api/auth/reissue: accepts { org_id }, returns JWT carrying org_id claim, idempotent (UI-1 resolution from upstream-issues.md). Adds creating_org -> ready transition with retry-budget tracking. classifyFailure pure function returns UnderlyingCauseTag. Uses existing AuthenticationError + provider pattern from refresh route.

steps.name: ActiveScope resolver invariants I1 to I5
steps.scenario_name: Four scope resolver scenarios incl deep-link cross-tenant stale-link
steps.scenario: slice-1-scope-resolver.feature - four scope contract scenarios from ADR-029
criteria: Four scope resolver scenarios green via driving port
Pure function resolveActiveScope unit-tested with zero fixtures per CM-D
Invariants I1-I5 enforced: org_id JWT match, project required when state needs it, atomic resource pair
Cross-tenant access returns 403 with named diagnostic
Stale-link reconciliation emits scope_reconciled FlowEvent
steps.implementation_notes: Pure function resolveActiveScope(route, jwt, machineContext) returns ScopeResolution. Unit tests live next to source. Backend cross-tenant guard returns 403 with diagnostic body. scope_reconciled FlowEvent emitted on stale-link reconciliation per ADR-029 I5.

phases.name: Slice 2 — Error recovery is honest and threaded
phases.description: Recoverable error UX with correlation_id threading and the TS UserFlowHarness public surface.

steps.name: Slice 2 recoverable error UX with reference codes
steps.scenario_name: Five recoverable error scenarios incl shareable code retry escalation KPI K3
steps.scenario: slice-2-recoverable-error.feature - five scenarios across US-003 happy and error paths
criteria: Five slice-2 recoverable-error scenarios green
correlation_id threads through every retry attempt
Closed-vocabulary discriminated union for underlying_cause_tag at TS compile time
Retry-budget tracks 3 attempts then escalates to error_terminal
KPI K3 scenario verifies emittable observability event names
steps.implementation_notes: error_recoverable side-state with underlying_cause_tag closed union. Retry-budget counter; 4th attempt -> error_terminal. Auth-proxy surfaces auth_recoverable_error_shown / auth_retry_clicked / ready_reached events to stdout JSON. KPI K3 asserts event name only per DWD-6 soft gate.

steps.name: TS UserFlowHarness seven-method public surface
steps.scenario_name: Six harness surface scenarios incl composition with sibling harness
criteria: All seven harness methods green via real flow-state HTTP
begin_auth, submit_org, assert_state, assert_scope work end-to-end
force_transient_failure and expire_token drive into recoverable-error and expired-token
Named-column scope diff formatter shape matches DatasetLayerHarness assertion style
Missing-scope diagnostic surfaces when chat turn lacks project context
steps.implementation_notes: Harness already has method bodies; verify each works against real tier and add dev-mode-only __harness_force_failure__ and __harness_expire_token__ event handlers in flow-state/index.ts (flagged surface per DWD-1). Composition test exercises sibling-flow pattern without re-implementing sign-in.

phases.name: Slice 3 — Expired token freeze and replay
phases.description: Cross-machine FREEZE/THAW with bounded replay buffer plus property-based journey invariants.

steps.name: Slice 3 expired token cross-machine freeze and replay
steps.scenario_name: Seven expired token scenarios incl replay buffer overflow restart survival
criteria: Six slice-3 expired-token scenarios green via actor tree pattern
Cross-machine FREEZE exercised end-to-end per ADR-028 actor model
Replay buffer bounded 5s timeout and 16 max queued mutations
Six IC invariants implemented as property-based tests with generators
Session survives flow-state container restart via Redis rehydration
steps.implementation_notes: expired_token side-state with silent re-auth invocation. broadcastFreeze and broadcastThaw on orchestrator per ADR-027. Replay buffer 5s/16-cap. silent_reauth_ok / silent_reauth_failed events from auth-proxy. Property tests use fast-check generators for IC-1..IC-6. Restart-survival probes Redis XRANGE rehydration. Playwright deferred unless UI-2 escalates.

validation.validator: orchestrator (translated from DISTILL roadmap, validated against DES schema and acceptance test coverage)
